metadata.name: LATHE Indian Voice AI Corpus v0.1
metadata.description: Hand-crafted utterances targeting failure modes that US-English benchmarks miss. Built for real Indian customer support, fintech IVR, and consumer voice agent scenarios.

hinglish_codeswitch.why_it_matters: Indian users naturally code-switch between Hindi and English mid-sentence. Most TTS models trained primarily on US English either pronounce Hindi phonetically wrong, or break prosody at the language boundary.

tests.text: Sir aapka order kal evening tak deliver ho jaayega, please apna address confirm kar dijiye.
tests.expected_behavior: Smooth prosody across the Hindi-English boundary; no awkward pause before 'deliver' or 'confirm'.

tests.text: Madam, payment successful ho gaya hai. Aapko ek confirmation message mil jaayega within five minutes.
tests.expected_behavior: 'Within five minutes' should sound natural in English register without robotic shift.

tests.text: Bhaiya, thoda hold kariye, main aapka account details check kar raha hoon.
tests.expected_behavior: 'Account details' must not be over-anglicized; should blend with the Hindi rhythm.

tests.text: Aapne jo loan apply kiya tha uska EMI 12,500 rupees per month set ho gaya hai.
tests.expected_behavior: Numerical '12,500' read correctly (twelve thousand five hundred), 'EMI' pronounced as letters (E-M-I), not 'emmy'.

tests.text: Order cancel karne ke liye press 1, agent se baat karne ke liye press 2.
tests.expected_behavior: IVR-style cadence; clear pauses around the digit prompts.

tests.text: Sorry for the inconvenience, hum aapke issue ko priority pe resolve kar rahe hain.
tests.expected_behavior: English-Hindi-English sandwich; intonation should remain apologetic throughout.

tests.text: Aapki KYC update ho chuki hai, ab aap full transaction limit use kar sakte hain.
tests.expected_behavior: 'KYC' as letters; 'transaction limit' clean English; no syllable drop on 'sakte hain'.

indian_proper_nouns_and_codes.why_it_matters: Indian financial systems run on IFSC codes, account numbers, and names that US-English TTS systematically mispronounces. This is the single highest-stakes failure mode for fintech voice agents.

tests.text: Please transfer to IFSC code HDFC0001234, beneficiary name Lakshmi Narayanan Iyer.
tests.expected_behavior: 'HDFC0001234' read as 'H-D-F-C-zero-zero-zero-one-two-three-four'. 'Lakshmi Narayanan Iyer' pronounced with correct Indian phonetics, not anglicized.

tests.text: Your appointment is confirmed with Dr. Subramaniam Krishnamurthy at Apollo Hospital, Greams Road, Chennai.
tests.expected_behavior: South Indian name handled without syllable collapse; 'Greams Road' kept as proper noun.

tests.text: The package will be picked up from sector 23, near Brigade Gateway, Rajajinagar, Bengaluru 560010.
tests.expected_behavior: PIN code '560010' read digit-by-digit, not as 'five hundred sixty thousand ten'. Locality names preserved.

tests.text: Your PAN card number ABCDE1234F has been linked successfully to Aadhaar ending in 5678.
tests.expected_behavior: PAN format (5 letters + 4 digits + 1 letter) read cleanly. 'Aadhaar' pronounced correctly (aa-dhaar, not 'aid-har').

tests.text: Please proceed to counter number 7 at Bandra-Kurla Complex branch for document verification.
tests.expected_behavior: Hyphenated compound 'Bandra-Kurla' read as single locality, not two separate words.

tests.text: Mr. Venkateswaran, your beneficiary Geetha Krishnamoorthy has received the amount in her ICICI account.
tests.expected_behavior: Two long South Indian names back-to-back; no truncation or merging.

credit_card_otp_readback.why_it_matters: The most regulated, error-intolerant TTS use case. Any digit error here is a compliance incident. Time-to-completion matters because customers hang up on slow IVR.

tests.text: Confirming your card number: 4532 1234 5678 9012, expiry 11/27, CVV 8-4-2.
tests.expected_behavior: Digits read in groups of four with brief pauses between groups; CVV digits clearly separated by intonation.

tests.text: Your OTP is 8-4-7-2-3-9. Please do not share this with anyone.
tests.expected_behavior: Each digit individually pronounced with pause; final security warning in slightly slower cadence.

tests.text: Press 1 to confirm transaction of 24,999 rupees, or 2 to decline.
tests.expected_behavior: '24,999' read as twenty-four thousand nine hundred ninety-nine; not '24,9-9-9'.

tests.text: Your reference number for this complaint is C-R-N slash 2 0 2 6 slash 0 4 5 8 1 2.
tests.expected_behavior: Mixed letter-digit-symbol sequence preserved; 'slash' rendered audibly, not silently.

tests.text: Account ending 4-3-2-1 has been debited 1,250 rupees, available balance is 87,432 rupees.
tests.expected_behavior: Last-four digits read individually; rupee amounts read as whole numbers; clean transition between the two number formats.

tests.text: Please dial extension 2-0-7 within the next 30 seconds, otherwise this call will disconnect.
tests.expected_behavior: Urgency in cadence on '30 seconds'; extension digits clearly separated.

tests.text: Transaction declined. Reason code: zero-five. Please contact your bank for assistance.
tests.expected_behavior: 'Zero-five' as two distinct digits, not 'oh-five' or 'five'. Concise IVR delivery.
